_publications._publicationTitle: Development of patient reported outcome measures assessing tumor pain intensity and tumor pain interference for individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 and plexiform neurofibromas: qualitative findings.

_contextSnippet: two PRO measures were developed that assess pNF-related pain intensity and pain interference in individuals with NF1 ages 8 years and older
details: Developed using qualitative data from patients and expert input to assess pNF-related pain interference in individuals with NF1 ages 8 years and older
